I would say keep pulling on wheels, and use the selectors when you need specific Awakeners, Enlightens, OverExalts. You could pull on Aequor if you have 2-3 Awakeners you want to have. I think… both is fine~
its easier to stack str in phase 1 , then take the extra turn to whale on em

If you wanna be real tryhard, it’s technically possible, someone has done it, proven, to beat the whole storymode with just Doll, Lotan, Ogier, Ramona, and ONLY pull WoDs, ignoring every other Awakeners.
Omg
It would but I think having more Awakeners(options) in D-Tide comes first for better team comps. Then I would focus on WoDs.
The thing about Enlightens is only that unit gets the Enlightened, and it’s hard to tell if it matters much in your specific case and team, unless you are struggling WITHOUT the enlightenment.
While WoDs can be used by any Awakener

Should I spend all my standard pulls for characters or also grab the wheel for them?
So far I have tulu and all aequor chars standard except Celeste

I would pull:
Chaos: Nautila/Karen
Aequor: Celeste/Caecus/Goliath
Caro: Faint
Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle/Casiah

Dont forget you have standard selectors, so if you dont wanna pull Caro, but still want Faint, you can just selector her. Then you dont need to RNG on Standard Caro Banner, wasting pulls
For wheels, I wouldn’t recommended pulling each characters “Signature Wheel”, but rather wheels that are just best for each role(Dps/Support/Survive)
The No.1 WoD everyone recommends is +12 Titan’s Blade for Dps
The No.1 WoD for Support is +12 Incalculable Favor
Other WoDs you might want are Path Forsaken/Bloody Feast/Chains Unbound/Fin of Sorrow/Death of Miss Coral/Memory Spiral

May I have advice on what characters to pull and use? Idk which realm banner to use standard pulls on

I like Caecus and the tentacle realm though I’m not sure what sort of team would work well with that. And I’m trying to get Pollux

I would recommend to pull:
Chaos: Nautila/Karen
Aequor: Celeste/Caecus/Goliath
Caro: Faint
Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle/Casiah

Dont forget you have standard selectors, so if you dont wanna pull Caro, but still want Faint, you can just selector her. Then you dont need to RNG on Standard Caro Banner, wasting pulls

For wheels(WoDs), I wouldn’t recommended pulling each characters “Signature Wheel”, but rather wheels that are just best for each role(Dps/Support/Survive)
The No.1 WoD everyone recommends is +12 Titan’s Blade for Dps
The No.1 WoD for Support is +12 Incalculable Favor

Other WoDs you might want are Path Forsaken/Bloody Feast/Chains Unbound/Fin of Sorrow/Death of Miss Coral/Memory Spiral

For a Tentacle team, simply pull Aequor units and form a team of them, if you wanna play pure tentacles, and nothing else. For Pollux, you want Castor as he significantly amps how much dmg Pollux can push out in a turn. Both of their WoDs(Castor and Pollux) are really good for them. Castor's WoD is really good in general because +2 hand size in a deck game is very noice. Pollux's WoD is good because Crit Rate + Crit Dmg + Base Dmg = Mhmmmmm Dammmmaggeeeee.
What selectors? Where is it
As you progress the game, I believe you get standard selectors by leveling up your account from the event tab

What seems to be the limiter? Surviving? Damage?
surviving
Leveling your team all to Lvl 50 can help with increasing stats, i.e max hp. Leveling your skills is important, and at this stage, they should be at least 3/6.
The Posse you run could also be defensive, and apply weakness or shield on demand.
The WoDs you run should work with each Awakeners role or their passive scalings.
Always run two R/Brown relics called "Frenzy" and "Gluttony" on your supports, in this case being Winkle and Caecus.
Your team is relatively solid and shouldn't need any Awakener replacements yet to clear 5-14.

"Frenzy" allows you to buy "Cursed Relics" and at this point, you should have a grasp on the power of themn. "Gluttony" allows you to forgo a "Orison" to increase your Max Hp, up to 2 times, by a percentage.
More Max Hp is valued in Aequor and Caro, as more Max Hp, means more shield from White Stance Tentacle, or more healing from Caro Furnace
Furthermore, percentage healed at 'Rest Spots"
Any further questions?

Pero acá está la lógica. Por el reino de Caro, consigues mucha fuerza y te puedes curar pero lo que importa es preservar el horno para que Salvador te dé mucho escudo y aguantar el vergazo de los enemigos. Thais sería tu batería de llave, carga exaltaciones y copia las cartas, siendo preferente la coste 2 de Caecus. Caecus genera counter de forma permanente y esta generación se basa mucho en la cantidad de daño que él acierta al enemigo. Faros te ayudaría a obtener las cartas que necesitas de la pila de robo con su exaltación cuando requieras una carta en específico que aún no te haya salido
Así de simple
Tu problema es que armas equipos que no se enfocan en ningún personaje
Ejemplo tiene con Caecus y las palomitas
Por eso, define quién será el que haga daño y haz un equipo que gire entorno a dicho personaje
